calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marlene Getchell for and Ricky Patton.
John Rueppel for Virgil Jackson and Jurine Jackson (Objectors).

The Court noted that it has approved the settlement agreement. Mr. Rueppel withdraws his objections. The Court granted the Petition for Spousal Property (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-03-2019 Continued To Sep-17-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Approve Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Sep-05-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marlene Getchell for and with Ricky Patton.
John Rueppel for Virgil Jackson and Jurine Jackson.

Counsel indicated that the Parties are still proceeding down the path of settlement and that there are no issues for the Court's concern. Mr. Rueppel provided an updated order which has the settlement agreement attached. The Court granted the Petition to Approve Settlement Agreement (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Mar-13-2019 Continued To May-22-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marlene Getchell appeared by telephone for Ricky Patton (Petitioner).
John Rueppel for Virgil Jackson and Jurine Jackson (Respondents).

Counsel reported that information has been shared, that there are still some pieces that have not been received and that they are amenable to mediation. The Court signed the order referring the matter to Pro Bono Mediation. Mediation must be completed no later than May 8, 2019. The Parties are to notify the Probate Examiner as to the outcome of mediation by May 15, 2019. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to and the Parties are to return on May 22, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to report on status of mediation.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-27-2019 Continued To Mar-13-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marlene Getchell for and with Ricky Patton (Petitioner).
John Rueppel and Daniel Swerdin for Virgil Jackson and Jurine Jackson (Respondents).

The Court noted that it now has objections challenging the validity of the will and the validity of the marriage, and stated that it is not at all clear that this can proceed as a spousal property petition. Ms. Getchell stated that this is really ashame, that there are several Attorneys here and that the estate is barely at $300,000.00. The Court asks if the parties are interested in doing mediation. Ms. Getchell said yes to mediation. Mr. Rueppel stated that there isn't enough information as to the value of the estate, that they have not done discovery and that he will have to speak with his Clients as to whether or not they are willing to participate in mediation. The Petition for Spousal Property is continued to March 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the parties to consider mediation. The Court expects the parties to cooperate and exchange information, and informed Counsel that this matter will either go off calendar on that date or it will order mediation. The Court also stated that it will entertain ex parte communication requesting an order to mediation in advance of the hearing.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-13-2019 Continued To Feb-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marlene Getchell for Petitioner.
Daniel Swerdlin and John Rueppel for and with Virgil Jackson and for Jurine Jackson (Respondents).

This was a pre-granted matter. Mr. Rueppel stated that he e-filed his objections yesterday. The Petitition for Spousal Property is continued to February 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
